places.name: The Royal Portuguese Cabinet of Reading
places.description: This stunning Brazilian library contains the largest collection of Portuguese texts outside of Portugal itself.

places.name: Largo do Boticário
places.description: Crumbling remnant of Rio's colonial past tucked behind Corcovado mountain in the neighborhood of Cosme Velho.

places.name: Parque Lage
places.description: Beautiful public park off the beaten path and away from tourists.

places.name: Rio de Janeiro Cathedral
places.description: This massive Brazilian church is built like an angular, technicolor pyramid left by Mayans from the future.

places.name: Biblioteca Nacional do Brasil
places.description: The largest library in Latin America owes its existence to an Old World earthquake and a Napoleonic invasion.

places.name: Largest Street Art Mural in the World
places.description: Eduardo Kobra’s breathtaking 32,300-square-foot graffiti wall took over Rio’s Olympic Boulevard.

places.name: Images of the Unconscious Museum
places.description: An overlooked collection of over 350,000 artistic works created by psychiatric patients using art therapy.
